sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73534" key="o(moblasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμο-βλαστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n73534.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sprouting at the same time,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:5:5:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.5.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
